note.value: Foliated in pencil, ff. 141a-141c; the last three folios are unnumbered and are identified by their conjoin and preceded by a minus sign, for example -141ar (recto) or -141av (verso)
Leather on wood. Lower board fragmentary; damaged spine
Unsewn palimpsest quire of three bifolios of smaller size, inserted after fol. 141: 1x6 (6)
